request: Plan a planning-only migration of shared Studio Brain storage contracts with clear rollback and recovery steps.

docket.objective: Produce a rollback-safe infrastructure migration plan.
docket.whyNow: The storage surface is growing and needs a clearer compatibility story before more services land.
constraints: Shared platform blast radius must stay low
unknowns: Which consumers rely on current schema assumptions

assumptions.statement: A staged migration is feasible if compatibility rows are preserved.
